programme.desc: A man who longs to be a musician instead of a bullfighter like his father has to compete with a childhood friend when they fall for the same woman. Their love triangle catches the eye of the spirits of the dead, leading him on a journey through their bizarre world. Animated adventure, with the voices of Diego Luna, Zoe Saldana and Channing Tatum(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends compete in a scavenger hunt designed by Raj to test their scientific knowledge and life skills, but the game brings out the best and worst in everyone. As the hunt progresses, Howard and Amy begin to bond over their shared musical tastes, while Penny and Sheldon work together as a team and Bernadette becomes fiercely competitive(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howard's new robotic arm creates problems(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys' flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the America's Next Top Model house(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is dismayed when the group spends the Thanksgiving holiday at Mrs Wolowitz's house, but hits it off with Bernadette's father. Meanwhile, Penny realises she must deal with a mistake from her past when she and Leonard have an argument. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After more than five years of dating, Sheldon and Amy spend their first night together, while Leonard, Howard and Raj must decide who will take their extra Star Wars movie ticket. Plus, Sheldon's Obi-Wan advises him on his difficult relationship decisions. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with recurring guest star Bob Newhart(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The comedy flashes back to reveal how Sheldon saved the lives of his pals, and looks at the origins of his friendship with Leonard seven years previously, as well as explaining the housemates' agreement. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy stay up all night as they await a telephone call that could bring big news from the Nobel Committee - is everything in their lives about to change?(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the US sitcom, there's an end and a beginning as the gang travel together into an uncharted future. Howard and Bernadette go away on a trip without their children for the first time, Leonard and Penny try to keep a secret, Sheldon and Amy stick together, and Raj makes a new friend(n)

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2 (2015)

They attempt to turn their fortunes around and redeem their reputation by competing in the World Championships of A Cappella in Copenhagen. Comedy sequel, starring Anna Kendrick and Rebel Wilson(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will plans to celebrate his birthday with a grown-up dinner, but his friends face a dilemma when they discover the event clashes with a more popular party. They end up gatecrashing the rival gathering, only to find that Simon's French exchange student steals the limelight(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

When the friends arrive in the West End, their efforts to appear cool are hampered by aggressive bouncers, a tramp and some angry bus passengers(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is asked to help co-ordinate the school's Duke of Edinburgh award scheme, but instead of carrying out his duties, he turns the situation to his advantage and tries to flirt with a university student. Meanwhile, Simon faces problems when his parents separate. Simon Bird and Joe Thomas star(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will becomes stressed as the friends prepare for their exams - apart from Jay, who finds himself preoccupied. Simon makes progress with Carli by helping her revise, and they all reminisce about the events of the past year. Comedy, starring Simon Bird(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction

Wolverhampton DJ Darryl hopes stripping everything back will him meet his ideal partner, while former ballet dancer Ania, from Preston, is tired of investing valuable time on people only to be disappointed when the clothes come off and has decided that being upfront is the key to relationship success. Anna Richardson hosts(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan and Neil Patrick Harris(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney cannot get out of bed on the morning of his wedding due to a major hangover. The gang tries to locate the far-fetched ingredients needed to concoct the famous 'Stinson's Hangover Fixer Elixir', so that he can attend a pre-nuptial photoshoot. Starring Neil Patrick Harris(n)

programme.desc: Carl begins to get jealous of the amount of time Mike is spending with Molly, so the lovestruck policeman agrees to let him go with them on a double date(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Meanwhile, Leonard struggles to be supportive of his girlfriend's career decision, Bernadette seeks Stuart's help in replacing one of Howard's comic books, and Howard and Raj provide Amy with some advice. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

Comedy, guest starring James Earl Jones and Carrie Fisher(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly discovers Adam is failing in Spanish class, and immediately blames his teacher. However, when she arranges for him to receive extra tuition, her plan backfires(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake makes an arrest without much proof, and so has to spend the next 48 hours collecting enough evidence to keep his suspect in custody. While his co-workers are forced to help him out over the weekend, Charles judges a pie contest between Rosa and Gina, and the Captain gives advice to Terry, who has a problem involving his brother-in-law. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome(n)

Holt looks for ways to improve the team's morale as they come to terms with being on the night shift, while Santiago is filled with curiosity when Diaz starts to take long breaks from her desk. Zooey Deschanel (New Girl) and Matt Walsh (Veep) guest star(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly confronts her husband after discovering her engagement ring is the same one Murray gave to his former fiancee. Assisted by Pops, Adam looks to a romantic comedy film for inspiration when trying to capture the attention of his attractive neighbour. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Four sets of campsite proprietors battle it out to be named best value, with the competition beginning at Amber's Bell Tent Camping in Mannington, Norfolk(n)

Former marksman Derek treats his guests to a spot of clay pigeon shooting, bringing out his competitive side(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to 500-year-old Layer Marney Tower in Essex for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed into luxury glamping lodges by Nick and Sheila Charrington. The guests have little to complain about with the accommodation, but a revelation over dinner changes how they see things. Plus, a treasure hunt organised by the hosts sends one team on a wild goose chase(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Day four is at the Foxhunter Park in Kent, where brother and sister Jane Stacey and Russell Saunders own a caravan site that includes a bistro and entertainment. The accommodation is luxurious but the large scale of the site does not sit well with the campers - and the evening entertainment of a fire-eating limbo dancer leaves most of them cold(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The campers meet for the final time to find out what they thought one another's stay was worth. Amber is offended by Derek's low scoring, while he is thrown by Nick and Sheila's feedback. Russell and Jane have an axe to grind with Derek whose low scoring of their park is made worse by what they see as a personal attack on their hosting, while Nick and Sheila appear to emerge relatively unscathed(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Solicitor Allison Hampshire hosts the first dinner party from Portsmouth, focusing on a sophisticated menu and quirky entertainment that she hopes will win her the £1,000 prize. Her guests are sociology lecturer William Dixon, counter manager Rose Proenca, adult tutor Kathy Anderson and actor Christopher Marlowe(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sociology lecturer Will Dixon hosts the second dinner party in Portsmouth. His soggy salad starter fails to impress Rose Proenca, and his over-cooked beef Wellington gets an even worse reception from the rest of his guests, but surprise entertainment helps him win back a few points(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Tutor Kathy Anderson hosts the third dinner party from Portsmouth and hopes to impress her guests with a Gallic-inspired menu. But all does not go to plan in the kitchen when she experiences a near-disaster with a pineapple, and later in the evening her French entertainment raises quite a few eyebrows(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stage actor Christopher Marlowe plays host in the fourth dinner party from Portsmouth, and tries to woo his guests with an adventurous menu and theatrical entertainment - including a one-man play involving a drunken waiter, which has a messy outcome(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Brazilian beauty-counter manager Rose Proenca hosts the final dinner party in Portsmouth, hoping her Turkish-themed menu will impress the other contestants. However, the entertainment is not to everyone's taste(n)

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans(n)

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: Dubbed 'The Beast' by Winston Churchill, Tirpitz was Nazi Germany's most powerful battleship. Protected by an elite squadron of fighters, it was seen as invincible, but after 34 failed attempts to sink it, the RAF sent in the 617 'Dambusters' Squadron and 9 Squadron. In a raid in November 1944 they managed to slip through enemy defences and destroy Tirpitz. With eyewitness accounts from surviving RAF crew, one of the Luftwaffe fighter pilots and German sailors, this documentary tells this extraordinary story and offers new evidence to explain the mission's improbable success(n)

programme.title: Guy Martin's Great Escape
programme.desc: Guy Martin wants to recreate the most iconic motorcycle stunt in movie history - the climax of the film The Great Escape, in which Steve McQueen's character Lieutenant Hilts steals a motorbike and attempts to jump two border fences into Switzerland. The original bike used in the film was a Triumph, and it's only right that Guy should convert and prep a modern Triumph Scrambler 1200 for his big stunt(n)

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Chatterbox Live
programme.desc: Stand-up show recorded at London's Bloomsbury Theatre in 2011, in which the comedienne shares humorous insights into her life, including the perils of living alone, and offers advice on such topics as non-fattening stress relief, the alternative to marriage and the acceptable face of adultery(n)

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Mrs Doyle wins a competition to meet a famous singer, and discreetly invites him round for tea - but the secret slips out, and soon the house is besieged by hordes of adoring pensioners. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Pauline McLynn(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

Scarlette Douglas shows her and daughter Kerrie five properties for £90,000 in and around the seaside town of Torrevieja(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

Angel designs another suite, with black walls and mosaic mirrors, and decorates the entire dining room with blossoms so a guest can make a special wedding proposal. The couple also consider the possibility of truffle farming(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Fresh from the success of hosting a three-day wedding at the chateau, Dick and Angel make business plans for the grounds, intending to charge people to fish in the moat and forage in the woods. Angel starts work on a second guest suite, but also wants to install an elevator, which pushes Dick's engineering skills to the limit(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Moped delivery man Hussnain, 24, is rushed to A&E after being caught up in an accident involving a police car chasing another vehicle. Seventy-six-year-old Edward is brought in due to his breathing difficulties and a serious pre-existing heart condition, while part-time wrestlers Kieran and James come in after Kieran injures his knee in a bout(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Sharpe struggles when a case involving an addicted mother and baby hits close to home, Frome uncovers a patient's surprising past and Reynolds makes progress in his personal life after receiving some bad news(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The documentary follows paramedics as they deal with people who have mental health problems. Maria Stanley is called to a multi-storey car park, where she tries to talk a man away from the edge, while Kirsten Harper and Amy Siddall race to help a father who is having suicidal thoughts. In London, crews attend the scene of a failed suicide attempt that has left a middle-aged man trapped under a train(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Cambridgeshire, the heli-medics race to treat a cyclist with a time-critical brain injury. And on the Norfolk Broads, holidaymaker Tom breaks his thigh bone jumping off a boat(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal takes over as Craggy Island's new milkman, but his predecessor, local womaniser Pat Mustard, returns to exact an explosive revenge on Ted for getting him sacked. Starring Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Europe's biggest brewery - Heineken in the Netherlands - on a mission to explain the difference between lager and ale. His journey takes a surprising twist when he comes face to face with the mother of all lagers. Kate Quilton sets Matt Tebbutt the challenge of making crumpets, and finds out how they get filled with unique holes at the Warburtons factory in Enfield, north London. Matt also heads for snowy Canada to discover why maple syrup is so expensive, and finds out that maple syrup robberies are a big concern to the industry(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Tim and Irene Foster are looking for a place to escape the cold British winters. Irene is originally from Cape Town in South Africa and has long dreamed of owning a property there so that she can see her family more often. With a budget of £240,000, Laura Hamilton shows them five properties on the Cape Peninsula(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jerry and Christine Steele's love of South Africa began decades ago and they have decided to spend part of their retirement in a second home among the beaches and national parks of the Garden Route stretch of the south-eastern coast. For their budget of £60,000, Laura Hamilton shows them five great value properties.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel look ahead to wedding season, with eight couples booking the chateau for their big day. Dick also converts a stone barn into a flat for Angel's parents, getting rid of 150 years' worth of rubbish in the process, but tensions rise between the couple when he gets carried away with the trees at the front of the property(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Self-confessed clutter collector Louise McGowan hosts the first in a week of parties from Sheffield, and plans to infuse her event with a sense of charity shop chic. However, it will take more than her motherly nature and eccentric habits to impress her fellow competitors, especially when they must first get past her penchant for hoarding(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Tribute band manager Paul Wood hosts the second dinner party from Sheffield, hoping his 1920s-themed entertainment and ambitious menu will win him the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Russian Yana Khodakovskaya hosts the third dinner party from Sheffield, and hopes to impress with an evening of delicacies from her homeland. Unfortunately, her diners find the food a bit heavy going(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Musician Tommy Jones hosts the fourth dinner party from Sheffield and has high hopes of scooping the £1,000 prize. However, all his hard work seems to go down the drain with a disastrous starter that sets in motion a series of rowdy mishaps(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nail artist and beautician Gina Shepherd hosts the final dinner party from Sheffield and hopes that her efforts will win her the £1,000 prize, but her guests have low expectations, which appear to be justified when she has numerous kitchen calamities(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the King's Head in Addlethorpe, Lincolnshire, where landlady Helen Coy and her bar manager and best friend Emma Green are pulling out all the stops to win. The B&B owners are taken back to their childhood at the funfair, At dinner, B&B beginners Louise and Andy Macbeth rattle nerves when Louise reveals her past career as a hospitality journalist - leaving pub veteran Helen less than impressed(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: B&B newcomers Andy and Louise Macbeth invite their rival hoteliers to spend the night at the dog-friendly Beck Hall in North Yorkshire, where an extra-critical Helen and Emma discover what they believe to be stray dog hairs in their bed. A fishing trip makes Terri feel a little out of sorts, and when the time arrives for feedback, the managers are surprised to learn two of their guests have indicated they would not come back for a second stay(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Albaston in Torquay for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed by owners and avid souvenir collectors, Kevin and Julie Shadbolt. Terri and Stuart are impressed by their room, but are startled by the memorabilia in the communal lounge, and expectations are raised at dinner when Kevin reveals he has a secret recipe for success when it comes to breakfast. However, at feedback the next day, tensions begin to rise(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay of the week is in Bournemouth, at Terri and Stewart's specialist dance holiday venue the Hotel Piccadilly, where a class in the grand ballroom soon has the guests in a spin. However, temperatures rise over dinner when the simmering tension between Louise and Helen finally boils over(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet up for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. King's Head landlady Helen challenges Louise and Andy about the problems they reported on cleanliness in the bathroom. while Louise and Andy from Beck Hall get hot under the collar when the others criticise their dog-friendly approach(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Extra Portions
programme.desc: The dinner party challenge visits Doncaster, South Yorkshire, where four contestants compete for the £1,000 prize. Mini-supermarket owner Harinder Khela hosts the first dinner party. Determined to impress with his enormous Indian feast, his hopes for the perfect evening are thwarted by Andrew Lloyd(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Extra Portions
programme.desc: The dinner party challenge visits Doncaster, South Yorkshire, where four contestants compete for the £1,000 prize. Arguments break out during image consultant Alison Tinsley's evening, with ladette Sarah Wells telling off Andrew Lloyd(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Extra Portions
programme.desc: In Doncaster, South Yorkshire, Sarah Wells hosts the third dinner party in a bid to win the £1,000 prize, but she has some making up to do for her behaviour in the last round(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Extra Portions

programme.title: Hail, Caesar! (2016)
programme.desc: An executive in 1950s Hollywood is employed to bury scandals, solve problems and ensure everything goes to plan for the studio. In one fraught day, he has to contend with the kidnapping of the leading man from the set of an ancient Roman epic, a musical star's secret pregnancy, and a director who objects to having a miscast actor forced on him. The Coen brothers' comedy, starring Josh Brolin, George Clooney, Scarlett Johansson and Ralph Fiennes(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.desc: Dave is unhappy about Nessa's plans to let Smithy see the baby, while Stacey ensures Gavin sticks to his promise as she tries to find a new job. Meanwhile, Dawn and Pete join Pam and Mick for a beer and curry night. Comedy, starring Joanna Page and Mathew Horne(n)

programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry(n)

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon introduces a seasonal special of the comedy panel game. Does one of the contestants really apologise to their boiled egg before smashing its head in? Who apparently writes Christmas cards with their feet? programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Extended edition. Irish actress, comedienne and writer Aisling Bea makes her debut appearance on the programme, joining fellow stand-ups Jason Manford and Johnny Vegas and regular panellist Alan Davies, who are all hoping they don't fall into the QI elves' traps and set off the klaxon(n)

Stand-up comedian Lloyd Langford joins Bad Education star Jack Whitehall, Only Connect host Victoria Coren Mitchell and regular panellist Alan Davies(n)

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Extended edition of the comedy panel game in which question master Stephen Fry continues his exploration of subjects beginning with the letter L, asking a range of fiendish questions about levity, levitation and lights. Comedian and The Last Leg co-host Josh Widdicombe joins The Great British Bake Off presenter Sue Perkins, Room 101 host and stand-up Frank Skinner and regular panellist Alan Davies(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Bible
programme.desc: Documentary offering an insight into some of the events in the Bible, beginning with the story of the Ten Plagues. In the Old Testament, the Book of Exodus describes the epic battle between the prophet Moses and Pharaoh. Experts offer various various explanations for the 10 plagues of Moses and the mass exodus of the Hebrew slaves out of Egypt, a story that is a cornerstone of the Jewish, Christian, and Muslim faiths(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Bible
programme.desc: Investigating the Turin Shroud, which is a length of linen cloth that some believe bears the image of Jesus. Cameras follow the efforts of a scientist trying to prove whether the cloth truly is Christ's burial robe(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The people responsible for tracking down war criminals who had evaded capture, beginning with the US army task force in charge of locating German scientists(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The story of Hitler's personal secretary Martin Bormann and the efforts to track him down. With insufficient evidence to confirm the Nazi official's death, the International Military Tribunal at Nuremberg tried him in absentia during 1946 and eventually sentenced him to death. Despite extensive efforts, he was never found and was eventually presumed to have died in May 1945(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: How the SAS War Crimes Investigation Team tried to pinpoint the location of Gestapo officers who were wanted for a host of atrocities(n)

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the vast and diverse continent, aiming to show its landscapes and wildlife as they have never been seen before. He begins in the Kalahari desert, Africa's south-west corner, where clever meerkats are outsmarted by a wily bird's use of mimicry, a solitary rhino is seen to exhibit previously unknown sociable behaviours, terrifying insects prey on baby birds and the rarest fish in the world is filmed for the first time. In the neighbouring Namib desert, which receives almost no rain, the competition for scant resources can be fierce, as proven by a ferocious fight for supremacy between two giraffes(n)

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: David Attenborough continues his exploration of the continent in east Africa, which is a haven for life and supports a higher density of large mammals than anywhere else on Earth. From dense forests to snow-capped peaks, steamy swamps to endless savannah, it's also a land of unpredictable extremes, where creatures must adapt to survive. In Tanzania, a tiny lizard risks its life to eat flies from the face of a sleepy lion. The nesting habits of the 4ft shoebill are also captured on camera - the giant bird has two chicks, but due to sibling rivalry only one will survive. On the plains of Amboseli, a baby elephant is near to death in the drought, so its mother leaves the herd to stay with her offspring until the bitter end(n)

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the varied creatures of the Congo rainforest, one of the most competitive habitats on Earth. A sweet-toothed chimpanzee uses a complex array of tools to access honey from a beehive, the elusive picathartes bird feeds unsuspecting frogs to its dinosaur-like chicks and a massive female python reveals her maternal side as she sunbathes to incubate her eggs. Tiny leaf-folding frogs battle it out kung fu style, and as darkness falls the forest elephants gather to face their rivals(n)

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: David Attenborough describes some of the wildlife spectacles of southern Africa, starting out in a little-explored rainforest discovered less than a decade ago by scientists who spotted it on satellite maps. There, thousands of butterflies dance for the right to mate, while on a tiny island off Mozambique, green turtles emerge from eggs and begin a hazardous journey to the water - with pied crows and hungry crabs eager to get them. Cameras also capture one of the largest gatherings of great white sharks on the planet as 30 of the predators circle around a dead whale(n)

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Documentary focusing the mountains of Africa, home to many rarely seen species. From the snow-covered peaks of Kilimanjaro to the Ethiopian Highlands where temperatures fall as low as -20C, wildlife continues to thrive, including the rat-catching wolves which revel in their rodent-infested territory and bone-smashing vultures with a taste for marrow. Unique habits and survival instincts are all on display as the unpredictability and numerous threats to mountain life are revealed(n)

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: The savannah's mixture of grassy plains and woodlands boast an array of wildlife, ranging from many species of big cat to herds of buffalo, wildebeest and gazelle. The programme explores the way animals and people have shaped these lands(n)

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: The wildlife of the African deserts, where rain may not fall for 10 years at a time. In spite of inhospitable conditions, a multitude of species survives in these arid landscapes, including cartwheeling spiders, camels, squirrels which use their tails as sunshades, and even crocodiles(n)

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Fergal Keane narrates a documentary focusing on the abundant wildlife found along the continent's 29,000km coastline. Species exist in habitats as diverse as the icy waters of the Cape and the tropical climes of the Indian Ocean, leading to some bizarre variations in behaviour - seals eat birds and die of heatstroke, crabs climb trees and penguins live in deserts(n)

programme.desc: The wildlife of Africa's green belt, an area spanning 5,500km from Uganda in the east to Sierra Leone in the west, which is hotter, brighter and wetter than anywhere else on the continent, allowing plants to flourish. programme.title: A Very British Country House
programme.desc: The hotel suffers desperate staff shortages just as guest bookings go through the roof, leaving the struggling workers pushed to the limit. programme.title: A Very British Country House
programme.desc: A hotel brand shoots a scandalous advert in one of the house's bedrooms, hoping to capitalise on the establishment's reputation. programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: Christmas at Chatsworth House

programme.desc: LED lighting salesman Richard Mercer hosts the third dinner party in Shropshire. He prepares a main course of paella, before suggesting a game of 'Guess the Gadget' to entertain his guests(n)

programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales embark on another waterway adventure, starting in the romantic city of Oxford, where they began their courtship many years ago. They follow the gentle contours of the Oxford Canal through the Cherwell Valley, where they meet novelist Philip Pullman and are joined by their son, fellow actor Samuel West. Tim and Pru follow in the footsteps of author Tom Rolt, whose vivid account of his journey down this canal in 1939 ignited a campaign that went on to save Britain's canals from extinction(n)

Calling himself Grave Digger, the killer enmeshes Mac in his scheme, claiming there is a bond between them - but the team has an opportunity to foil his plan when he unwittingly reveals the identity of his next target. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Make Me a Perfect Murder (1978)
programme.desc: A TV executive's assistant responds to being denied a promotion by killing her boss, then uses her years of experience working on detective shows to create the perfect cover-up. But she reckons without the intervention of Columbo, who begins laying his trap for her while also nursing a neck injury. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Trish Van Devere(n)

programme.title: Columbo: How to Dial a Murder (1978)

Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Nicol Williamson, Frank Aletter and Kim Cattrall(n)

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Former politician Edwina Currie and TV presenter Mark Durden-Smith compete, teaming up with their relatives - who in Mark's case includes his famous mother Judith Chalmers - to guess the answers to surveys of 100 people.
